_comment: Schema for user-config.json. The pre-flight check in run-weekly.md reads this file and compares against the user's config. Any field with an 'upgrade_notice' that is missing entirely from user-config.json triggers a non-blocking notice to the user. When adding new config fields, add them here — the upgrade notice system picks them up automatically.

workspace_path.description: Absolute path to the workspace folder

fred_api_key.description: FRED API key for economic data

preferred_currency.description: User's preferred currency for ETF investments (CHF, EUR, USD, GBP)

browser_access.description: Whether Chrome browser tools are available for analyst monitoring

schedule_day.description: Day of week for scheduled run

etf_mapping_last_updated.description: Date of last ETF mapping refresh
